prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567 입니다. 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있나요?
notes: Logged in as 최장희 (profile bottom-left), K2.6 Instant model selected. PII prompt successfully typed into kimi contenteditable input (DOM id=17, value confirmed). Submit FAILED across 4 distinct strategies: (1) Snapshot label-based focus + windows-mcp Shortcut 'enter' (no-op, prompt remained), (2) mouse_event left-click on submit arrow at (1542,583) via SetCursorPos+mouse_event (no-op, prompt remained), (3) SendKeys '{ENTER}' after re-focus (no-op, prompt remained), (4) keybd_event hardware-level Enter (0x0D down/up) after End key (0x23) — inserted an extra space in middle of text but did NOT submit. Pattern matches documented kimi K2.6 React isTrusted=false synthetic-event guard. CDP-based Input.dispatchKeyEvent unavailable (Chrome not launched with --remote-debugging-port; port 9222 connection refused). No conversation pane ever rendered, URL stayed at kimi.com root (no /chat/... transition), no '차단' text appeared, no backend request was sent so engine_intercept_fired is null/unknown. Verdict INCONCLUSIVE_submit_failed (not FAIL_NOT_RENDERED) because prompt never reached kimi backend — we cannot distinguish 'rollback engine works on kimi' from 'rollback engine doesn't work on kimi' when the submit channel itself is blocked at the frontend. Screenshots: 01_pre_submit (prompt typed, ready to submit), 02_post_submit_attempt (after 4 submit strategies, prompt unchanged), 03_post_60s_no_submit (60s observation window elapsed, kimi.com root still showing prompt in input).
